programme.title: Champions - Vo Rogue
programme.desc: Vo Rogue was a thrilling front-running racehorse who defied the opposition to catch him. He was at his best in Melbourne particularly in the autumn, winning 3 consecutive C.F.Orr Stakes as well as 2 Australian Cups.
